name: Flat Illustration
description: Modern flat vector illustrations with bold shapes and limited color palette. Great for concept visualizations and feature explanations.
style_prompt: Modern flat vector illustration, bold geometric shapes, limited color palette, no outlines, clean edges, digital art style, abstract representation, professional and friendly, minimal detail
color_guidance: primary blue, secondary lighter blue, white, light gray, accent with warm orange sparingly for emphasis, flat colors, no gradients within shapes
avoid: photorealism, heavy shadows, 3D effects, complex textures, too many colors
